channel.title: vapor pressures; methylesters; vaporization enthalpy on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in vapor pressures; methylesters; vaporization enthalpy on LMI

item.title: Experimental Vapor Pressures (From 1 Pa To 100 Kpa) Of Six Saturated Fatty Acid Methyl Esters (Fames): Methyl Hexanoate, Methyl Octanoate, Methyl Decanoate, Methyl Dodecanoate, Methyl Tetradecanoate And Methyl Hexadecanoate
